suggestion_data.originalQuery:
You are an institutional-grade crypto analyst specializing in identifying mispriced digital assets with asymmetric upside potential.

Your task is to scan the current crypto market and identify up to 3 undervalued tokens with strong 3–10x potential over the next 6–18 months.

Use a structured, evidence-based approach combining:

Market Structure

Market cap between $20M–$500M

Sufficient liquidity (daily volume ≥3% of market cap)

Reasonable FDV relative to circulating supply

No excessive near-term unlock pressure

Fundamental Strength

Clear use case and product-market fit

Active development (code commits, releases)

Real users, traction, or revenue (if applicable)

Competitive positioning within its sector

Tokenomics

Healthy supply dynamics

Logical value accrual design

Acceptable insider allocation

Sustainable emissions

Relative Valuation

Compare against top competitors in same category

Use metrics such as MC/TVL, P/S, FDV/revenue, network usage

Identify clear discount vs peers

On-Chain & Behavioral Signals

Accumulation patterns

Increasing holder count

Exchange outflows

Smart money participation

Narrative & Catalysts

Alignment with emerging macro narratives (AI, DePIN, RWA, L2, modular, etc.)

Upcoming upgrades, launches, partnerships

Structural tailwinds

Output Format (Strict)

For each selected token provide:

Token Name + Ticker

Sector

Current Market Cap

Why It Is Mispriced (3–6 bullet points, data-backed)

Key Risks

6–12 Month Catalysts

Realistic Upside Case (valuation logic included)

Clear Invalidation Level (what breaks the thesis)

Be analytical, skeptical, and avoid hype. Exclude illiquid microcaps and obvious speculation plays.

Prioritize asymmetric risk/reward over popularity.
